user_system_path: Verdict calibration (#518): finish making the daily verdict ship live. #516 grounded hunt findings (unit-proven, deployed) but live verification on the owner is incomplete (manual call cap + stale fixture got in the way). Verify via the 11:00 UTC cron; if the brain still SAFE_SILENCEs, calibrate the remaining over-strict gates (schedule-resolution, goal-drift anchor, discrepancy-card-frame weak_risk) with test/replay proof, never blind loosening.
allowed_files_raw: This roll-forward PR is governance-only (control-plane docs + SESSION_HISTORY). The #518 work itself, when picked up: lib/briefing/** (artifact-taste-pack.ts gate calibration, discrepancy-card-frame.ts), lib/utils/api-tracker.ts (manual call cap segmentation), and tests. Verification is primarily live (cron -> pipeline_runs) plus unit/replay proof for any gate change.
forbidden_files_raw: No Stripe, Scout, schema/migration, or secrets changes. No auto-send. No BLIND loosening of positive_winner_contract or the discrepancy-card quality gate (the #452 'hollow drafts' mistake) — every gate change carries a test + before/after read.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck (roll-forward); for #518 code work additionally: npx vitest run lib/briefing/__tests__/
required_browser_proof: Live (owner): after the 11:00 UTC morning-pipeline cron, pipeline_runs.outcome flips from generation_failed_sentinel to generation_returned for 2cbc1bab, and a real (non-fixture) verdict card appears on the dashboard.
browser_proof_command: manual: wait for / trigger the morning-pipeline cron, then query pipeline_runs for outcome=generation_returned and confirm the dashboard verdict is a real grounded move (not pipe_test, not an anchor hold).
acceptance_condition: Control-plane rolled to #518 with gate:continuity green; the next session can confirm the live verdict via cron and, if needed, calibrate the remaining gates with proof. No blind loosening.
anti_regression_checks: no edits under app/api/stripe, lib/scout, supabase/migrations
any positive_winner_contract / discrepancy-card change carries a unit test + before/after read
stop_condition: Session-closeout roll-forward lands on claude/verdict-calibration-518 -> main; #518 captures the live-verification + gate-calibration work. gate:continuity + typecheck green.
next_command: Next session: read #518. Check pipeline_runs for the owner after the 11:00 UTC cron (expect generation_returned). If still SAFE_SILENCE, calibrate missing_schedule_resolution_context / goal-drift anchor / discrepancy-card-frame weak_risk with test+replay proof. Owner: set Vercel OWNER_USER_ID/FOLDERA_SELF_USER_ID -> 2cbc1bab-8e0e-43b0-bf4a-9a0cd6b5d91f; consider raising/segmenting the manual directive cap.
